instructions: When the user needs a chart or data visualization, emit an ```a2ui fenced block with A2UI v0.9 NDJSON messages (one JSON object per line): createSurface, updateComponents (include root), and optional updateDataModel. Use component Chart with type bar|line|pie|doughnut and chartData as [{label, value}]. Do not emit executable JavaScript or raw ECharts option objects.

Chart.description: Interactive chart rendered with ECharts on the client.

chartData.description: Series points or a data-model path
